name: Approve Products to List on Amazon
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To list and sync products between Neto and Amazon you need to mark them as 'approved' in Neto. This will allow Neto to update the price and stock levels on Amazon, keeping them in sync with your other marketplaces."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Register products on Amazon Australia by following the steps "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/700-set-up-amazon-mapping-for-product-registration", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products in Neto can be approved in three ways:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/774-approve-products-to-list-on-amazon#individually", "children": [{"text": "Individually"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/774-approve-products-to-list-on-amazon#in-bulk", "children": [{"text": "In Bulk"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/774-approve-products-to-list-on-amazon#import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "Using the Import Wizard"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto cannot end or delete listings on your Amazon account. Neto will now be able to update the prices and stock levels of your products on Amazon. This process occurs approximately every 15 minutes."}]}]
